active.name: Glaciate
active.effects: Unleash a fan of icy shards in a cone in the target direction, dealing {{as|300|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 85% AP)}} {{as|magic damage}} to enemies struck within and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 70% for {{fd|1.5}} seconds. Enemies hit in the center of the cone are {{tip|root|rooted}} for the same duration instead.

effects_structured.raw: Unleash a fan of icy shards in a cone in the target direction, dealing {{as 300 magic damage}} {{as (+ 85% AP)}} {{as magic damage}} to enemies struck within and {{tip slow slowing}} them by 70% for {{fd 1.5}} seconds
Enemies hit in the center of the cone are {{tip root rooted}} for the same duration instead.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Everfrost is modeled as an active cone cast: enemies in the cone are slowed, and center-hit enemies are rooted for the same duration.
Execution-semantics review confirms both slow/root outcomes share the active cooldown and resolve from the same Glaciate cast.

Economy representation note: Tier-1 datasets expose distributed-item gold fields (total 1000 / sell 400); these values are retained for reconciliation while acquisition remains Prismatic Item Anvil/mode-scoped rather than standard shop purchase.
Mode-availability note: Everfrost is currently represented as an Arena-scoped distributed identity; non-Arena usage should be mode-gated by data policy.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
